label: Problem-solving - extension popup bug
promptText: Debug why the browser extension popup opens blank on first load. I want likely root cause, exact fix, and how to verify it.

questions.label: What should the next step confirm first?
questions.helper: Pick the first runtime checkpoint the next prompt should verify before changing more code.

questions.label: What should the next answer optimize first?
questions.helper: Choose the most useful next debugging move.

answers.answer: The popup should render the review panel on first open.
The popup opens blank until the user closes and reopens it.
